projectDescription: A modern desktop application for Apple container management on macOS
keyFeatures: Apple Container Management - Full GUI for Apple's container CLI on macOS 26.0+
Container Operations - Create, start, stop, remove, and inspect containers
Image Management - Pull, push, import, export, and manage container images
Built-in Terminal - Integrated xterm terminal with PTY support for advanced commands
Network & DNS - Advanced networking configuration and DNS management for containers
Registry Management - Configure and manage container registries and policies
Volume Management - Handle persistent storage for containers
Modern UI - Beautiful ShadCN-inspired interface with dark/light themes
Native macOS App - Built with Tauri 2.x for Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/M4)
Database Integration - SQLite with Drizzle ORM for state management
Data Visualization - Charts and graphs with LayerChart
Auto Updates - Built-in updater for seamless version management
publicApiSurface: Container Operations: getAllContainers, startContainer, stopContainer, removeContainer, inspectContainer, getContainerLogs
Image Operations: getAllImages, pullImage, removeImage, inspectImage, importImageFromTar, exportImageToTar
Terminal: Built-in PTY terminal with tauri-pty integration
Database: Drizzle ORM with SQLite (migrations, schema management)
Frontend Components: Atomic design with atoms, molecules, organisms (Svelte 5)
Services: containerization, fs-events, sqlite, tray services
Build Scripts: db:generate, db:migrations:rust, tauri:build, download-apple-container-cli
